horoscope: Early today is strong for paying attention to the technical details of your plans or artistic pursuits, dear Aries, as well as the logistics of a romantic relationship. As the day advances, the Sun and Neptune clash, and this influence can challenge your goals or even your confidence temporarily. If you haven't been paying enough attention to your spiritual and emotional needs lately, you could feel drained or lacking in direction now. The key to taming inner restlessness is to truly understand what is causing the dissatisfaction. This involves digging deep, as many of the reasons we give ourselves for dissatisfaction are superficial and temporary. You may be feeling a little left out or disappointed until you recognize your true needs.

Transits early today help you see the value of planning, stretching out the good things so they last longer, and exercising patience, dear Taurus. Forgoing a pleasure now seems worth it if it's practical and promises greater benefits later. However, as the day advances, your idealistic side is in the spotlight. With a Sun-Neptune square in play, watch for a tendency to trick yourself into believing something that's not very realistic. Hold back on the more involved decision-making, if possible, since judgment is cloudy temporarily. Conversations may be complicated just for now, and thought patterns or problem-solving might frustrate you if you are looking for reliable answers. If you've denied yourself necessary rest, downtime, or spiritual sustenance, the side effects can emerge now. Remind yourself of the need to feed your imagination, spirit, and faith. It's a busy time for you on a mental level, and you can have a hard time pulling yourself away, so it may be a good idea to consider creative, restful ways to engage your mind; this way, you reach a compromise.

Others value you for your contributions and dedication early today, dear Gemini. Following some rules helps clear your conscience and can benefit your communications or studies. Cooperation brings rewards and possibly some meaningful feedback. Something you start now is likely to have staying power. It's a good time to put your inspiring, innovative ideas to work for you in the practical world. However, as the day advances, it becomes difficult to see things clearly. Financial matters may need attention, and it will be important to avoid lending or borrowing just for now. While you’ve been more objective about your financial state, talents, and resources these days, facts are unlikely to be clear as the Sun and Neptune clash, and it’s temporary. Wishful or fearful thinking can skew your perceptions. For this reason, it’s better to wait for a clearer time to make important practical decisions. Consider more imaginative, engaging ways to do, or drum up, business. Avoid letting others’ demands, beating around the bush, or complaints drain you. If it’s possible, put some of your worldly goals on pause so that you can take care of your emotional and spiritual needs.

There can be traditional and wise information coming your way in the first half of today, dear Cancer. You're considering your priorities and perhaps relishing the prospect of doing some budgeting or planning. It can be a time for reducing redundancies or otherwise simplifying your life and feeling better off for it. Or, putting your things in order can have a nice, comforting effect on you now. Still, energies turn around as the day advances, and the Sun in your sign squares Neptune. It's an important period for discovering your independence, learning about yourself and your needs, and formulating personal goals. However, there can be times when you feel a little empty or discontented without a solid plan or definite course of action in place. This is the influence of Neptune in your solar tenth house, which can stimulate some level of confusion about life-plan or career goals, or a lack of direction. You could experience a need to do more or to find your true calling. This may be at the root of restless feelings now. While you can't resolve these issues in one fell swoop, you may need to take some extra time to get into better touch with your inner needs before going forward.

Priorities are more apparent early today, dear Leo, and you're able to make a realistic assessment of your capabilities. As a result, you take on no more and no fewer endeavors than you need. You might establish yourself with someone special or with groups through publications or advances in your field. Balancing and moderating things makes good sense at this time. However, as the day advances, with a Sun-Neptune square, the temptation can be to turn on the emotional blinders about a matter that you don’t want to face just yet. While it’s best to avoid drawing conclusions for now, you should make extra effort to avoid glossing over important details. Ask yourself if something seems too good to be true, or, alternatively, seems too fantastical to hold weight, before banking on it now. Consider that you may be tricking yourself when it comes to a belief or goal. Aspiring towards a goal is one thing, but if it’s preventing you from enjoying the moment, then you may need to focus on something more practical. It may be a good time to challenge your perception of a past issue or a belief, since all may not be as it seems.

Energies early today are practical and responsible, dear Virgo, but as the day advances, the Sun and Neptune form a square, and you may be facing some uncertainties related to financing, support, boundaries, and power dynamics. Question marks can temporarily interfere with your motivation. A relationship or financial matter may be hanging in the air, but it may be better to observe and wait things out. Do watch for poor management of money and even feelings. Consider that the discontent or restlessness you're experiencing now might ultimately lead to significant changes or discoveries. This transit may serve as a reminder to consider your need for rest and replenishment. While it's an important period for reaching out and collaborating, you shouldn't entirely brush off your needs for a deeper connection or time to yourself. You may be struggling with wishful thinking that's interfering with seeing a situation clearly. If you've neglected to seek inspiration recently, it may be evident that you need it now.

Easy energy is with you early today for working alongside others with few demands on your time or resources, dear Libra. However, as the day advances, it can be an overcast time in the relationship department with the Sun forming a square aspect to Neptune. There may be important details missing, and they're likely to be glaring at a later date, so aim to be vigilant if making important decisions. If something doesn't feel quite right or complete, consider waiting it out. This can be a time for dealing with illusions that have closed your eyes to progress and growth, or the viability of dreams. The tendency to feel drained of energy or enthusiasm runs high, and this can serve as a reminder to take a pause.

Early today, you're willing to give up immediate pleasures to ensure a long win, dear Scorpio, and this strategy works well for you now. Personally, shows of affection through simple gestures can go over well. There can be real benefits to considering others' input or advice or healing rifts. However, as the day advances, a Sun-Neptune square suggests the need to put some plans on hold temporarily. This way, you can take better care of yourself and your needs for purpose, inspiration, imagination, and emotional fulfillment. The Sun in your adventure sector encourages a more dynamic relationship with the world around you, but if you're ignoring important personal routines in the process, you may not fully enjoy or appreciate your experiences. A bit of chaos in your personal affairs can play with your schedule and delay plans altogether. On the other hand, feeling overwhelmed or uncertain prevents you from taking a definite step forward, and you feel in limbo. Disorganization or fatigue can get the better of you now. Consider that discontent may have its root in needs for more fulfilling, creative, or imaginative work.

Your reliability is more noticeable early today, dear Sagittarius, and people appreciate you. As the day advances, imagination is powerful, possibly to the point of self-deception, but if harnessed in the right direction, you can be highly creative. It's a time for looking within and finding ways to better satisfy your needs for imagination and spiritual meaning, even if it temporarily takes you away from pursuing your more worldly goals. Friendships may be more supportive than love connections just for now, but you are also in a good position to learn much about yourself and your needs through your love relationships and feelings. Your appeal is powerful but the need to slow down and center yourself before pushing ahead shouldn't be ignored today. Confusing signals or a sense that things are up in the air in your life, especially with money, support, and relationships, can leave you feeling in limbo. If there is some wavering about going forward with a relationship or financial matter, perhaps it's a sign to wait.

Dividing your time between work or chores and pleasure more effectively makes everything a little less stressful early today, dear Capricorn. A technique for improving your productivity may be close at hand. You may very well take pleasure in fulfilling your responsibilities, particularly to your home, personal life, family, or loved ones. You'd prefer to drop an idealized image of someone or a situation in favor of seeing things for what they truly are. This is a good time for recognizing and loving others' flaws, and don't forget to do the same for yourself. However, energies turn around as the day advances. If you've been spending too much time in the world of the mind or with others at the expense of your needs for solitude, you'll feel the pull of your emotional and spiritual needs now. There could be a feeling of discontent, disappointment, or confusion initially, and it's important to keep expectations of others and of situations at bay. Depending on others to make you happy is a gamble at best, but with more attention to your relationships these days, it's important to seek out their company. The trick is to enjoy your connections, but look within for sustenance, taking full responsibility for your actions and reactions.

You are gracious with your responsibilities early today, dear Aquarius, and you don't waste time on things that distract you from the task at hand. Concentrating and focusing on something special to you can be gratifying. Your spirit to learn and improve is strong, and motivation may very well be about a particular person or relationship in your life. As the day advances, a Sun-Neptune square can cast a veil over a situation and leave you feeling vaguely unanchored or uncertain of your next step. However, it also gives you time to consider those things you've been neglecting. This is especially the case with your needs for spiritual fulfillment, imagination, and healing, which can be easily overlooked these days with your drive to clear up physical clutter and organize your practical affairs. The more you've swept these needs under the carpet, the more discontent you are likely to feel now. Your mind is likely to drift, and it can be hard to stay on course. For best results now, aim to let go of a need for control and definition as much as possible. Take a break from thinking and doing too much.

Making a personal sacrifice to make something right or advance a goal seems very well worth the effort early today, dear Pisces. Better relations on the job can ultimately help your bottom line or make you feel more secure in your work. As the day advances, however, you can be a little more sensitive with a Sun-Neptune square clouding perceptions. This transit encourages a look within for answers, yet we tend to look outside of ourselves for happiness, which can lead to disappointment. Wishful thinking can be at play now, and while it's important to entertain possibilities and fantasy, it's also best to discern the areas of life where you need to stay grounded. Focusing on the tasks at hand may not be your favorite thing to do now. If something touches upon your higher ideals or inner dreams, motivation improves, so if possible, attend to your more imaginative and creative activities. Watch for a tendency to look the other way if faced with money problems, or to borrow from the future to satisfy a temporary desire.
